differences.change: Directory scans skip any archive path segment; explicit file scans still inspect it.
differences.reason: Archived history is outside the reader-facing documentation surface.

differences.change: IF/THEN is not an audience signal.
differences.reason: Decision records use the token as reader-facing technical vocabulary.

differences.change: byte-identical is not a provenance signal.
differences.reason: The phrase describes technical data fidelity.

differences.change: The audit command accepts named, reasoned suppressions while the compatibility linter preserves Version 0 output.
differences.reason: The canonical standard requires justified long documents and sections instead of unconditional rejection.
